use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation or header components
Show participant avatars in comment sections or chat interfaces
Render team member images in organizational charts or directories
Display author avatars in blog posts or article listings
Show profile images in card-based layouts or user listings
ai_summary: A minimalist avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with support for images, fallbacks, and proper accessibility. Features rounded-full design with muted background fallbacks, clean Tailwind styling, and forwardRef support for integration with form libraries and state management. Designed as a foundational atomic component for displaying user identity across SaaS, e-commerce, and social applications.
